description: Create a Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\crime_query\ to query the SQLite crime incident database at C:\Users\Docker\talon_data\crime_incidents.db. The module must include crime_query.py and crime_query.talon. Implement actions for crime_search_case(case_number: str), crime_list_type(crime_type: str), crime_count_district(district: int), and crime_recent(count: int) to query the 'incidents' table (columns: case_number, date, primary_type, description, location_description, arrest, district). Map these actions to the voice commands 'search case <user.text>', 'list crimes <user.text>', 'count district <number>', and 'show recent [<number>]' (defaulting to 5).
